CTN 4, 054 [unidentified hemerology][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[...]-⸢KAM₂⸣ [I].⸢BI₂?⸣.ZA ŠE.GE.[DA]

[...] financial loss; (or) it is favourable.

o 22

[...]-KAM₂ ḫi-bil-⸢tu₄?⸣

[...] wrongdoing.

o 33

[...] GABA.RA.AḪ TI

[...] panic; (or) good health.

o 44

[...] U₄ [...]-KAM₂ NU.UN.ŠE.GE.DA

[...] the [...] day is unfavourable.

o 55

[...] U₄ 21-KAM₂ ZI.GA ŠE!e

[...] on the 21st day: loss of barley.

o 66

[...] U₄ 26-KAM₂ NU.UN.ŠE.GE.DA

[...] the 26th day is unfavourable.

o 77

[...] U₄ 29-KAM₂ NU.UN.ŠE.GE.DA

[...] the 29th day is unfavourable.

o 88

[...] U₄ 30-KAM₂ UZU ŠAḪ NA.AN!?.GU₇.E maš-ka-⸢du?⸣ [x (x)]

[...] on the 30th day: he should not eat pig's meat; (or) maškadu-illness [...].

o 99

[...] AB.ŠE.GE.DA

[...] it is favourable.

o 1010

[...] AB.ŠE.GE.DA

[...] it is favourable.

o 1111

[...] ⸢AB⸣.ŠE.GE.DA

[...] it is favourable.

[...] it is unfavourable.

o 1313

[...] it is favourable.
